description: MCP server configuration. This file can be committed to share MCP servers with your team.

code-explorer.name: code-explorer
code-explorer.description: Code Explorer (gitnexus binary) — graph-powered code intelligence: query, impact/blast-radius, callers, hotspots, complexity over a pre-indexed knowledge graph. Canonical name `code-explorer` so it de-dups with a user-level entry of the same name (avoids loading 31 tools twice). Local path /home/patrice/DEV/gitnexus-rs/target/release/gitnexus; /home/patrice/code-buddy/src is indexed. https://github.com/phuetz/code-explorer

lm-resizer.name: lm-resizer
lm-resizer.description: lm-resizer — context compression for agents (compress noisy tool output, retrieve originals by hash, stats). Build https://github.com/phuetz/lm-resizer and enable. Code Buddy also auto-compresses tool output before the LLM when CODEBUDDY_LM_RESIZER=true.

pubcommander.name: pubcommander
pubcommander.description: PubCommander editorial control: drafts, approval queue, scheduling dry-runs, guarded publication and analytics.

pubcommander-editorial.name: pubcommander-editorial
pubcommander-editorial.description: PubCommander templates, writing styles, content pillars, ideas and viral references.

pubcommander-media.name: pubcommander-media
pubcommander-media.description: PubCommander generated-media inventory and YouTube transcription.

pubcommander-autoblog.name: pubcommander-autoblog
pubcommander-autoblog.description: PubCommander AutoBlog configuration visibility for book and website campaigns.

pubcommander-analytics.name: pubcommander-analytics
pubcommander-analytics.description: PubCommander real stored publication performance by platform.

pubcommander-automation.name: pubcommander-automation
pubcommander-automation.description: PubCommander visual automations and execution history.
